title: $408 of YOUR Money Vanishes Every December
hook: The government gave you a tax-free healthcare account — then buried a rule that deletes your own money if you forget about it.
angle: Most FSA holders don't know their balance expires annually — the industry pockets $1.6 billion in forfeited funds, with the average worker losing $408 of their own pre-tax dollars
audience: Anyone with an employer-sponsored FSA or considering open enrollment
key_numbers: 30% instant tax savings on eligible purchases
